problem id: 1ed83cae
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHL(6)

examples:
  00101101 -> 00000000
  01000001 -> 00000000
  10001000 -> 00000000
  00001111 -> 10000000
  00001000 -> 00000000
  01000111 -> 10000000
  11100101 -> 01000000
  00000100 -> 00000000
  01011000 -> 00000000

query: 01001101
predicted answer: 00000000
